Class TacletExecutor

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.rules.TacletExecutor<@NonNull Goal, @NonNull TacletApp>
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.executor.javadl.TacletExecutor
All Implemented Interfaces:
RuleExecutor<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
FindTacletExecutor, NoFindTacletExecutor
public abstract class TacletExecutor extends TacletExecutor<@NonNull Goal, @NonNull TacletApp>
Encapsulates the application engine of taclets. Several methods require instantiationInformation objects: in this implementation the following additional instantiation information concerning labels must be provided:
  • termLabelState: The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
  • labelHint: The hint used to maintain TermLabels. the instantiations of the schemavariables

    • syntacticalReplace

      protected Term syntacticalReplace(Term term, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo mc, @NonNull Goal goal, @NonNull TacletApp tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
      a new term is created by replacing variables of term whose replacement is found in the given SVInstantiations
      Specified by:
      syntacticalReplace in class TacletExecutor<@NonNull Goal, @NonNull TacletApp>
      Parameters:
      term - the Term the syntactical replacement is performed on
      applicationPosInOccurrence - the PosInOccurrence of the find term in the sequent this taclet is applied to
      mc - the MatchConditions with all instantiations and the constraint
      goal - the Goal on which this taclet is applied
      tacletApp - the TacletApp with application information
      services - the Services
      instantiationInfo - additional instantiation information concerning label:
      • termLabelState: The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
      • labelHint: The hint used to maintain TermLabels. the instantiations of the schemavariables
      Returns:
      the (partially) instantiated term

    • applyContextUpdate

      protected Term applyContextUpdate(SVInstantiations p_svInst, Term formula, Goal goal)
      Specified by:
      applyContextUpdate in class TacletExecutor<@NonNull Goal, @NonNull TacletApp>

    • instantiateSemisequent

      protected ImmutableList<SequentFormula> instantiateSemisequent(Semisequent semi, PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence, MatchResultInfo matchCond, Goal goal, TacletApp tacletApp, LogicServices services, Object... instantiationInfo)
      instantiates the given semisequent with the instantiations found in Matchconditions
      Overrides:
      instantiateSemisequent in class TacletExecutor<@NonNull Goal, @NonNull TacletApp>
      Parameters:
      semi - the Semisequent to be instantiated
      applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence of the Term which is rewritten
      matchCond - the MatchConditions including the mapping Schemavariables to concrete logic elements
      services - the LogicServices with the logic and program model information
      instantiationInfo - additional instantiation information concerning label:
      • termLabelState: The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
      • labelHint: The hint used to maintain TermLabels. the instantiations of the schemavariables
      Returns:
      the instantiated formulas of the semisequent as list

    • applyAddrule

      protected void applyAddrule(ImmutableList<? extends Taclet> rules, @NonNull Goal goal, LogicServices services, MatchResultInfo p_matchCond)
      adds the given rules (i.e. the rules to add according to the Taclet goal template to the node of the given goal)
      Specified by:
      applyAddrule in class TacletExecutor<@NonNull Goal, @NonNull TacletApp>
      Parameters:
      rules - the rules to be added
      goal - the goal describing the node where the rules should be added
      services - the Services encapsulating all java information
      p_matchCond - the MatchConditions containing in particular the instantiations of the schemavariables

    • applyAddProgVars

      protected void applyAddProgVars(ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> pvs, SequentChangeInfo currentSequent, Goal goal, PosInOccurrence posOfFind, LogicServices p_services, MatchResultInfo matchCond)
      Specified by:
      applyAddProgVars in class TacletExecutor<@NonNull Goal, @NonNull TacletApp>
